mapper.sql: ( (#{semester} IS NULL AND sm.is_current = 1) OR ( #{semester} IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END = #{semester} ) )
mapper.select:
SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.section_id) FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS course_count, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cs.enrolled_count), 0) FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS total_students, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cs.capacity), 0) FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS total_capacity, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) FROM professor rp JOIN course_section rcs ON rcs.professor_id = rp.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = rcs.semester_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.section_id = rcs.section_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE rp.user_id = #{userId} AND rcs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS avg_satisfaction, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification n LEFT JOIN course_section ncs ON ncs.section_id = n.target_section_id LEFT JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = ncs.semester_id WHERE n.recipient_user_id = #{userId} AND n.type = 'COURSE_REVIEW' AND n.is_read = 0 AND ( n.target_section_id IS NULL OR (
) ) ) AS new_review_count FROM dual

SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, cs.enrolled_count AS student_count, ss.start_time, ss.end_time, cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN section_schedule ss ON ss.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ss.day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} AND ORDER BY ss.start_time, c.course_name, cs.section_no

SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, cs.enrolled_count AS student_count, cs.capacity AS max_students, ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) AS satisfaction FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollment e ON e.section_id = cs.section_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' LEFT JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND GROUP BY c.course_code, c.course_name, cs.section_no, cs.enrolled_count, cs.capacity ORDER BY c.course_name, cs.section_no
